steps.title: Match the cosine ratio
steps.content: For angle $y$, cosine equals adjacent side over hypotenuse. The figure shows hypotenuse $JL=24$, and the adjacent side is $KL$. The given ratio has denominator $24$, so it is already comparing a side length to that hypotenuse.

steps.title: Solve for the side
steps.content: Use the given ratio. $$\cos y^\circ=\frac{KL}{24}$$ $$\frac{23}{24}=\frac{KL}{24}$$ $$KL=23$$ The answer is 23.
